title: Before you register - Canada.ca
content:
You must have all of the following informations when you register for a payroll account:
- Date employees receive their first wages (leave blank if date is unknown)
- Months covered for payroll of employees' wages
- Type of pay period (for example, weekly, quarterly)
- Payroll service name (if any)
- Country of parent company or affiliate, if you have a foreign owned corporation
- Name of franchisor and country of franchise's head office (if any)
You will also need all of the following if it differs from the basic business information above:
Learn more: Business number and CRA program accounts - Gather your information .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
